pr.title: Attention Warm-Start: Initializing Q/K from Bigram Co-occurrence SVD

output.summary: Warm-starts layer-0 attention by initializing Q/K from PMI-like bigram co-occurrence SVD projected into model space before training.
techniques: Layer-0 Q/K initialized from PMI-like bigram counts via SVD to embed real token relationships
Fixed random projection compresses the 1024×1024 co-occurrence matrix into the 512-d model space before factorization
Sequential SVD slices feed each head while norm rescaling matches the default orthogonal init
